title: Interest Rate Sensitivity — Refinancing Risk Elevated
summary: Variable-rate facilities now 74% of total debt. DSCR fallen to 1.18x — approaching 1.1x covenant trigger.
recommendation: Discuss hedging options with client. Flag for watchlist.
signal_1_detail: DSCR dropped from 1.42x to 1.18x — covenant trigger at 1.1x.
signal_2_detail: Latest accounts show 22% increase in finance costs YoY.

title: Sector Alert — UK Retail Fashion Contraction Q3 2025
summary: UK retail fashion contracted 8% QoQ. 14 SMEs in portfolio affected. Sector avg risk score 42→51. €18.4M aggregate exposure at elevated risk.
recommendation: Review all Retail/Fashion SMEs for covenant compliance. Prioritise DPO >60 days or revenue decline >10%. Consider sector exposure cap.
signal_1_detail: UK fashion retail sales down 8.2% QoQ. Consumer confidence at 18-month low.
signal_3_detail: Online returns up 34% — demand weakness not captured in gross sales.

title: Macro Alert — BoE Rate Hold 5.25% — Full Portfolio Recalculation
summary: BoE held base rate at 5.25% for third consecutive meeting. 31 SMEs move to elevated risk. Variable-rate exposure: €47.3M. Construction and Food/Hospitality most impacted.
recommendation: Immediate: identify SMEs within 10% of covenant triggers. Model +50bps and +100bps scenarios. Engage RMs for top 10 most exposed.
signal_1_detail: Base rate held 5.25% — MPC vote 6-3. Market pricing 65% probability of hike in Q1 2026.
signal_2_detail: 31 SMEs (31%) have variable-rate exposure >50% of debt. Avg DSCR 1.31x — down from 1.58x twelve months ago.
signal_3_detail: Construction DSCR avg 1.18x. Food/Hospitality 1.22x. Both approaching 1.1x covenant threshold.

title: Multi-Signal Risk Escalation — Immediate Review Required
summary: Three concurrent adverse signals detected. Risk score escalated from 45 (Stable) to 73 (Critical) in 30 days.
recommendation: Schedule urgent review call with CEO within 48 hours. Request updated management accounts. Review covenant compliance.

signal_2_detail: Monthly visitors − 38.5% QoQ. Bounce rate 38%→58%. Conversion rate 4.8%→2.3%.
